manifest.description: Monitors AI provider usage quotas (Claude, etc.) and exposes real-time usage data to agents and the dashboard so they can make smart decisions based on remaining capacity.
manifest.author: Paperclip Company

claudeOauthToken.title: Claude OAuth Token
claudeOauthToken.description: OAuth access token for the Anthropic usage API. Found in ~/.claude/.credentials.json under claudeAiOauth.accessToken. Leave blank to auto-detect from the local machine.

pollIntervalMinutes.title: Poll Interval (minutes)
pollIntervalMinutes.description: How often to refresh usage data from providers.

jobs.description: Periodically fetches usage quota data from configured AI providers and stores it for agent access.

tools.name: get-usage
tools.description: Returns current usage quota windows for configured AI providers (utilization percentages, reset times, limits). Use this to check how much capacity remains before starting expensive operations.

tools.name: get-usage-summary
tools.description: Returns a brief human-readable summary of current usage across all providers, including remaining capacity and reset times.
